posts.text:
The American people are SICK of performative politics. We don’t want a SHOW VOTE we want RESULTS! We want the SAVE America Act delivered to the President’s desk.

Video

The House GOP has a lot of flamethrowers. EVERY SINGLE SENATOR that is HIDING BEHIND THE TALKING FILIBUSTER needs to be PRIMARIED by one of the House members with a spine. POTUS should hold off on endorsing ANY more Senators until they do their jobs!

The Senate thinks the American people are stupid, but the truth is everyone knows their upcoming vote on the SAVE America Act is nothing more than a SHOW VOTE. 

It is guaranteed to fail, so calling the vote means nothing unless the talking filibuster is invoked.

Video

We love you @SusieWiles


Susie Wiles (@SusieWiles)

Last week, I was diagnosed with breast cancer.

Nearly one in eight women in the United States will face this diagnosis. Every day, these women continue to raise their families, go to work, and serve their communities with strength and determination. I now join their ranks.

I am grateful to have an outstanding team of doctors who detected the cancer early and are guiding my care, and I am encouraged by a very good prognosis.

I am also deeply

Good Afternoon America,
   This week the Senate will learn all their bills will die in the House until they can get election integrity passed. We will kill every single one of their bills for as long as it takes.

The Honorable Neal “ain’t” Dunn!!! :) We are happy you are sticking with us! Who else would I continue my conversations regarding prions in deer meat with?! ✨🙏🏼🇺🇸


The Patriot Oasis™ (@ThePatriotOasis)

🔥🚨 JUST IN: President Trump has Speaker Johnson tell a story about how he SAVED Rep. Neal Dunn's life, who had a terminal diagnosis and was going to DIE by June.

TRUMP: "Go ahead and tell the story!" 

JOHNSON: "It was a grim diagnosis, and I told the Presdient." 

TRUMP: "What was the diagnosi

Patriots in the House are trying to deliver this common sense legislation to the President’s desk but the Senate is blocking it. Call your Senators and let them know how that makes you feel.


Trump War Room (@TrumpWarRoom)

.@PressSec on the SAVE America Act:

"The President has made it very clear: he wants that bill on his desk here at the White House ASAP. It is 5 of the most common sense proposals that any party has ever put forward, and the American people overwhelmingly support this bill."

This👇. Why are more people not talking about the CCP’s strategy with birth tourism!


Cernovich (@Cernovich)

If birthright citizenship is granted, then the over 1,000,000 anchor babies brought over via birth tourism and being raised in communist China can return to swing states, vote Democrat, and turn America over to the CCP.



— https://nitter.net/Cernovich/status/2033026210054418582#m

All @SenateGOP legislation will now die in the house for their failure to get VOTER ID passed into law. 

Meanwhile they had dog parades, went on CODELS, pushed for payment in lawsuits that personally benefited themselves, etc…. Yet they could NOT debate Voter ID? 

SMH.

It is time for a convention of states. Congress will never term limit itself… and as you are seeing it is broken. Too many of these cats get up to DC and hop onto the uniparty train. The problem is the uniparty doesn’t work for you! It works for special interest.
Our founding fathers knew what they were doing with the 2A. That is the reason why we are not in the same position the EU is currently and the UK regarding their push for digital ID etc.

Gun Control is a common talking point for Dem voting base, however, even in DC there is a large number of Democrat members of Congress who conceal carry. “Rules for thee but not for me” is their MO.


Libs of TikTok (@libsoftiktok)

HOLY SHIT

Virginia Democrats are EXEMPTING THEMSELVES from a new gun control bill

“The provisions of this section shall not apply to any member of the General Assembly”







— https://nitter.net/libsoftiktok/status/2033216850176180583#m

Elizabeth Warren refused to allow for a PERMANENT BAN on CBDC in the Senate Housing bill. We are going to kill it anyways due to the Senate’s inaction on SAVE AMERICA Act however, it is important for EVERYONE to know that if CBDC’s are not banned, the government can control every aspect of your life. Massively terrifying.

Based Hagerty @BillHagertyTN


Eric Daugherty (@EricLDaugh)

🚨 BREAKING: Sen. Bill Hagerty (R-TN) says he FULLY SUPPORTS a talking filibuster to pass the SAVE America Act this week

Yes! Get 50 GOP senators on board 🔥

"I am certainly willing to do that and move into that zone. Let's GET on the floor, let's START this debate, and see how embarrassed the Democrats are as they try to articulate an indefensible position!"

"Let's see how THEIR voters press them. Over 70% of Democrats want to see th
